# @petstore/sdk

A sample Pet Store API for testing Ironic SDK generation.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @petstore/sdk
```

## Usage

```typescript
import { PetstoreClient } from '@petstore/sdk';

const client = new PetstoreClient();
```

## Authentication

Set your API key:

```bash
export PETSTORE_API_KEY="your-api-key"
```

Or pass it directly:

```typescript
const client = new PetstoreClient({ apiKey: 'your-api-key' });
```

---

*Generated by [Ironic](https://github.com/ironic-sdk/ironic).*
